context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Animation played when player feeds Echo seeds
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60, head lowered toward food bowl at (16, 100)
context.usage_scenario: Triggered when food bowl is filled and Echo is hungry, plays once then returns to idle

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with head tilted downward toward food bowl, beak opening and closing
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art with organic hand-drawn feel, no gradients
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on crest, beak, and body silhouette

animation.description: Frame 1-3: head lowering toward bowl, Frame 4: beak opens, Frame 5: beak closes on seed, Frame 6: head raising back up

visual_specification.details: Head angle changes from 0° (idle) to approximately 45° downward, beak opens 2px gap in frame 4, seed visible in beak frame 5 (3x3px #FFA300), crest remains in normal position throughout

relationships.shared_with: Same body size and colors as echo_idle
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle (head position and beak movement), echo_hungry (actively eating vs looking at empty bowl)

explicit_negations: No continuous eating loop (plays once per feed action)
No chewing animation beyond single beak open/close
No sound effect visualization (handled separately by audio system)
